properties.verseOrder: v1 v2 v3 v2 v4 v2 v5 v2

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: I will meet you in the morning, Just inside the Eastern Gate, Then be ready, faithful pilgrim, lest with you it be too late.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I will meet you, I will meet you Just inside the Eastern Gate over there; I will meet you, I will meet you, I will meet you in the morning over there.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: If you hasten off to glory, Linger hear the Eastern Gate, For I'm coming in the morning, So you'll not have long to wait.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Keep your lamps all trimmed and burning, For the Bridegroom watch and wait, He'll be with us at the meeting, Just inside the Eastern gate.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: O the joys of that glad meeting With the saints who for us wait, What a blessed, happy meeting, Just inside the Eastern Gate.
